title: koeleria spicata subsp. dianthema
intro: Koeleria spicata subsp. dianthema, also known as Diantha Grass, is a plant species belonging to the Poaceae family, commonly found in grasslands and open areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koeleria spicata subsp. dianthema include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of infusions or decoctions, are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
